reason: `candidate_mapping_in_bounds_pmem` uses `<=` (non-strict) while `candidate_mapping_in_bounds` uses `<` (strict) — the inconsistency means a physical mapping can touch the boundary of `range_mem` but a virtual mapping cannot touch `upper_vaddr`, which may cause edge-case mismatches
